title: elaeocarpus gambutanus
intro: Elaeocarpus gambutanus, also known as the "blue duke" or "blue fig," is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus gambutanus include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves or fruits, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions.
